prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photograph of a joyful young South Asian woman at golden hour beside a calm river. She stands on a riverside promenade with a metal railing, her body turned partly away from the camera and her head turned back over her shoulder, smiling warmly with closed eyes. She has long wavy dark hair cascading down her back, wears ornate gold jhumka earrings, bangles, and a deep navy blue traditional outfit with sheer draped fabric, delicate small gold embroidery, and wide shimmering gold borders. One hand rests gently on the polished metal railing in the foreground. The river fills the left and center background with a bright golden sun reflection on the water; the right side shows the walkway receding with railings and posts. Background trees and distant riverbank are softly blurred. Use warm sunset backlighting, glowing highlights, shallow depth of field, candid lifestyle photography, natural pose, elegant festive mood, realistic skin and fabric texture, 85mm lens look, soft bokeh, high dynamic range. Keep the composition waist-up to three-quarter length, subject slightly right of center, no text, no watermark.
